name: canshare-tnm-haematology-non-mf-or-ss-pm
title: NZ AJCC haematology cutaneous B cell or T cell non Mycosis fungoides and non-sezary syndrome lymphoma pathological M category
description: A pathological distant metastasis stage (pM) of a cutaneous B cell or T cell lymphoma (non Mycosis fungoides and non-sezary syndrome), using the AJCC cancer staging manual (latest edition).
